# Move only methods of a receiver whose names match the regex.
# The type declaration itself is NOT moved.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink filters.go -receiver MyStruct -regex '^Filter' -move
cmp filters.go expected_filters.go
cmp big.go expected_big.go

-- big.go --
package p

type MyStruct struct{}

func (m MyStruct) FilterA() {}
func (m MyStruct) FilterB() {}
func (m MyStruct) Other()   {}
-- expected_filters.go --
package p

func (m MyStruct) FilterA() {}
func (m MyStruct) FilterB() {}
-- expected_big.go --
package p

type MyStruct struct{}

func (m MyStruct) Other() {}
